name: hexa-loop
description: /hexa-loop [seed] [--adapter=atlas|bench|byte-diff|smoke] [--diverge-only] [--engine mk9|mk10] [--max-rounds N] тАФ canonical HEXA-LOOP, the universal self-evolving loop. Generalizes the discover тЖТ verify тЖТ absorb тЖТ next-seed тЖТ rotate cycle with a PLUGGABLE verify-adapter, so ONE loop drains ANY active domain (math ┬╖ perf ┬╖ codegen ┬╖ web) to genuine depletion. Each round: (1) DISCOVER тАФ mining-style lens divergence + connect convergence saturate on the active domain (the old /mining auto, now an internal stage) PLUS a `hexa kick`/`hexa drill` breakthrough probe on the ranked candidates (the old mirror-loop 'miningтЖТkickтЖТ' discover step, now internal), (2) ЁЯФМ VERIFY-ADAPTER auto-selected by active-domain kind тАФ atlas (math: `hexa atlas register --from-drill` / `hexa verify`, fold to embedded.gen.hexa) ┬╖ bench (perf: measure тЖТ byte-diff IDENTICAL + roofline % (achieved/binding-roof ┬╖ achieved-peak denominator) + ╬Ф vs baseline) ┬╖ byte-diff (codegen: regen byte-equality) ┬╖ smoke (web/service: liveness assert), (3) ABSORB the verified result into the domain's SSOT тАФ atlas embed (embedded.gen.hexa) ┬╖ *.bench.md ┬╖ .verdicts/<slug>/<id>.txt ┬╖ ledger, (4) feed the verified result as the next-frontier seed, (5) explicit disk checkpoint per round (throttle-resilient ┬╖ mining 0.5.0 discipline), (6) depletion test тЖТ else ScheduleWakeup 1200s rotation to depletion. Guards inherited VERBATIM from mirror-loop тАФ HONEST g63 (drill/verify SKIP/FALSIFIED/ЁЯЯа/ЁЯЯб/тЪк rejected, never absorbed), IDEMPOTENT (dedup pre-check skips an already-absorbed result), ACTIVE-DOMAIN ONLY (g58 ┬╖ reads ~/.sidecar/active-domain ┬╖ refuse off-domain). Preset shorthands тАФ `--adapter=atlas` тЙИ the old /mirror-loop (math atlas-fold loop) ┬╖ `--diverge-only` тЙИ the old /mining (discover stage only, no verify/absorb). Adapter EXTENSION hook тАФ drop `~/.sidecar/loop-adapter/<name>.md` (verify-step + absorb-target schema) to add a custom adapter, mirroring mining's `~/.sidecar/lens/<name>.md` lens extension. ABSORBS + RETIRES /mining (now the discover sub-stage / --diverge-only) and /mirror-loop (now the --adapter=atlas preset). The kick command (`/kick`) is KEPT тАФ it is a `hexa kick`/`hexa drill` CLI-verb wrapper that hexa-loop's discover stage CALLS, not an orchestrator. Defaults тАФ adapter=auto ┬╖ engine=mk9 ┬╖ max-rounds=25 ┬╖ budget=0 (local). Triggers тАФ '/hexa-loop', 'эЧеьВм ыгиэФД', 'ы▓ФьЪй ыгиэФД', 'ьЮРъ░АьзДэЩФ ыгиэФД', 'loop any domain', 'universal loop', 'self-evolving loop', 'ъ▒░ьЪ╕ы░й', 'ouroboros ыУЬыЭ╝ьЭ┤ы▓Д', 'miningтЖТverifyтЖТabsorb эЪМьаД', 'self-evolve atlas', 'lens ы░ЬьВ░', 'ьаРьЮЗъ╕░', 'diverge only', 'pluggable verify loop'.
